focus: Common root cause for doc/schema-to-code drift
findings: MCP public tool definitions, Zod schemas, allowed-parameter maps, handlers, docs, catalog, and playbook are separate maintained surfaces.
memory_embedding_reconcile drift is a concrete example: docs/catalog mention dryRun while handler uses mode.
Governed ingest fields are runtime-accepted but public-schema-hidden.

ruledOut.reason: runtime and public contracts also diverge
